title: pectis elongata var. oerstediana
intro: Pectis elongata var. oerstediana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Mexican tarragon or Mexican bush daisy. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers of Pectis elongata var. oerstediana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
